name: Ataa Educational Company
summary: Ataa Educational Company, an education company, engages in the establishment of kindergarten, primary, middle, and secondary schools for boys and girls in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. The company operates through Private Schools, International Schools, Indian Schools, and French Schools segments. It is also involved in the establishment, management, and operation and maintenance of computer training centers. Ataa Educational Company was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Riyadh, the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
